clouds._c_iceflag: 2 = Streamer/Fu1996 (re_ice 5–131 µm)  |  3 = Fu1998 generalized D_ge (5–140 µm)
clouds._c_re_liq: µm  |  liquid droplet effective radius when not in sounding  |  typical 5–15 µm
clouds._c_re_ice: µm  |  ice crystal effective radius/D_ge when not in sounding  |  typical 20–80 µm

vertical_grid._c_res: km  |  0.25 fine  0.5 standard  1.0 coarse  |  above 15 km always 1 km to 50 km

output._c_clearsky: true = also write lw/sw _clr variables  |  false = all-sky only
